name: tabrows
description: Keyboard-first outliner with sharing, public links, markdown import/export, and SQLite persistence.

scripts.check:syntax: node --check server.cjs && node --check app.js && node --check storage.js && node --check markdown.js && node --check outline.js
scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm test && npm audit --omit=dev
scripts.test: node tests/smoke.test.mjs && node --test tests/unit/*.test.mjs && playwright test
